case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. HONZIE ABRAHAM et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, HONZIE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-03-2008
